dialogue_text: And what, think you, may have been the fate of the princess, Dejah Thoris?
source_excerpt: "And what, think you, may have been the fate of the princess, Dejah Thoris?" I asked as casually as possible.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

source_excerpt: "She is dead," he answered. "This much was learned from a green warrior recently captured by our forces in the south. She escaped from the hordes of Thark with a strange creature of another world, only to fall into the hands of the Warho...

dialogue_text: This much was learned from a green warrior recently captured by our forces in the south. She escaped from the hordes of Thark with a strange creature of another world, only to fall into the hands of the Warhoons. Their thoats were found wandering upon the sea bottom and evidences of a bloody conflict were discovered nearby.
